# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Resources/resourceGroups"
    apiVersion: "2021-04-01"
    name: "[parameters('resourceGroupName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    resources:
      - type: "Microsoft.Web/sites"
        apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
        name: "[parameters('functionAppName')]"
        location: "[parameters('location')]"
        kind: "functionapp"
        properties:
          serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]"
          identity:
            type: "SystemAssigned"
          siteConfig:
            appSettings:
              - name: "AzureWebJobsStorage"
                value: "[parameters('storageConnectionString')]"
              - name: "FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME"
                value: "dotnet"

      - type: "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"
        apiVersion: "2021-04-01"
        name: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
        location: "[parameters('location')]"
        sku:
          name: "Standard_LRS"
        kind: "StorageV2"
        properties: {}

      - type: "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults"
        apiVersion: "2021-04-01"
        name: "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
        location: "[parameters('location')]"
        properties:
          sku:
            family: "A"
            name: "standard"
          tenantId: "[subscription().tenantId]"
          accessPolicies: []

      - type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers"
        apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
        name: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
        location: "[parameters('location')]"
        properties:
          administratorLogin: "[parameters('sqlAdminLogin')]"
          administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('sqlAdminPassword')]"

      - type: "Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts"
        apiVersion: "2021-03-15"
        name: "[parameters('cosmosDbAccountName')]"
        location: "[parameters('location')]"
        properties:
          databaseAccountOfferType: "Standard"
          locations:
            - locationName: "[parameters('location')]"
              failoverPriority: 0

  - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
    apiVersion: "2020-04-01"
    name: "[guid(parameters('functionAppName'), 'StorageRole')]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'acdd72a7-3385-48ef-bd3c-8c5b8a1f7b7a')]"
      principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"

  - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
    apiVersion: "2020-04-01"
    name: "[guid(parameters('functionAppName'), 'KeyVaultRole')]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'b8b3a4c4-0b7e-4f7b-8e6e-1b8b8b8b8b8b')]"
      principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"

  - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
    apiVersion: "2020-04-01"
    name: "[guid(parameters('functionAppName'), 'SqlRole')]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'b2a3d3b3-0b7e-4f7b-8e6e-1b8b8b8b8b8b')]"
      principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"

  - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
    apiVersion: "2020-04-01"
    name: "[guid(parameters('functionAppName'), 'CosmosDbRole')]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'b8b3a4c4-0b7e-4f7b-8e6e-1b8b8b8b8b8b')]"
      principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"

parameters:
  resourceGroupName:
    type: string
  location:
    type: string
  functionAppName:
    type: string
  appServicePlanName:
    type: string
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
  keyVaultName:
    type: string
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
  sqlAdminLogin:
    type: string
  sqlAdminPassword:
    type: securestring
  cosmosDbAccountName:
    type: string
  storageConnectionString:
    type: string
